channel.title: James-Altucher on MarkJacobsen.net
channel.description: Recent content in James-Altucher on MarkJacobsen.net

item.title: What The Future Holds… (How to Use Physics to Predict the Future) with Michio Kaku
item.description:
Probably more questions than answers, but still very interesting.

338 – Michio Kaku: What The Future Holds… (How to Use Physics to Predict the Future) – Altucher Confidential

item.title: Surviving the Unthinkable
item.description:
You never like to think it could happen, but it’s always a good idea to be prepared.

[310: Tim Larkin: Surviving the Unthinkable][1][1]: https://jamesaltucher.com/2018/01/tim-larkin/

item.title: Tyra Banks and her mom on the Jame Altucher Show
item.description:
Great interview with Tyra and her mom…

339 – Tyra Banks: – Altucher Confidential

item.title: 12 Rules for Life: A Solution to Suffering
item.description:
Some hard truth here…

312 – Jordan B. Peterson: 12 Rules for Life: A Solution to Suffering – Altucher Confidential

item.title: Real Artists Don’t Starve
item.description:
Like the reminder to charge what you’re worth. Also learned a little history lesson.

Ep. 303 – Jeff Goins: Real Artists Don’t Starve – Altucher Confidential

item.title: Linda Papadopoulos: Validation: Why It’s Dangerous…
item.description:
The comparison of social media to a public bathroom door seems apt…

Ep. 296 – Linda Papadopoulos: Validation: Why It’s Dangerous…

item.title: Ray Dalio: Principles for Investing in a Meaningful Life (Tested Strategies from 1 of The World’s Wealthiest Investors)
item.description:
Not sure why it isn’t listed on his website, but if you subscribe to his podcast you probably would have caught this.

Pain + Reflection = Progress

5 step process:
Identify Goals
Identify problems
Diagnose root cause
Design way around
Push through and execute design

Ep. 290 – Ray Dalio: Principles for Investing in a Meaningful Life (Tested Strategies from 1 of The World’s Wealthiest Investors)

item.title: Floyd Landis: The Consequence of Exposing a Legend
item.description:
Interesting story. Discussion about the need to use performance enhancing drugs to reach the highest levels is thought provoking.

Ep. 278 – Floyd Landis: The Consequence of Exposing a Legend: Learning How to Take Your Life Back & Overcome Rejection – Altucher Confidential

item.title: The Only Rules You Need to Know
item.description:
Another oldie but goodie…

  • The 4/64 Rule (80/20 of the 80/20)
  • The 1000 Hour Rule (Good enough to be great, but not the best)
  • The 30/150/Millions Rule (know/gossip/stories)

Read the full article here

item.title: 10 Regrets You Can Avoid
item.description:
Here’s the list, but please  read the full article for additional detail/context…

  1. Don’t buy things
  2. Don’t fall in love with someone that is in love with someone else
  3. Don’t try to please people
  4. Run, don’t walk
  5. Don’t make promises you can’t keep
  6. Don’t steal paperclips from the office
  7. Don’t wait for them to say yes
  8. Don’t do anything you don’t want to do
  9. Don’t consume bad things
  10. Don’t time travel into the past

Again, here’s the [full article][1].[1]: https://jamesaltucher.com/2014/06/10-regrets-you-can-avoid/

item.title: Mike Van Cleave: A Conversation About Cancer & Learning How to Discard the Meaningless
item.description:
A good and sobering reminder…

Ep. 288 – Mike Van Cleave: A Conversation About Cancer & Learning How to Discard the Meaningless – Altucher Confidential

item.title: Tim Ferriss: Using a New Lens To Make Life Easier
item.description:
Tim Ferriss is making the rounds again for his new book, but he always has something worth listening to. Consider this.

Ep. 281 – Tim Ferriss: Using a New Lens To Make Life Easier – Altucher Confidential

item.title: Tyler Cowen: What the Future Holds: Stagnation or Innovation?
item.description:
An interesting perspective to consider. Then go out and DO something!

Ep. 282 – Tyler Cowen: What the Future Holds: Stagnation or Innovation? – Altucher Confidential

item.title: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be
item.description:
A worthwhile listen on the art of persuasion even if the main subject discussed is unpleasant.

Ep. 276 – Scott Adams: The Hardest Sell: Convincing Someone You’re Not What You Used to Be – Altucher Confidential

item.title: John C. McGinley: The Root of REAL Reinvention: Having The Right Attitude
item.description:
Dr Cox was probably the single reason I watched Scrubs, and the interview is fascinating. Enjoy!

Ep. 275 – John C. McGinley: The Root of REAL Reinvention: Having The Right Attitude – Altucher Confidential

_You can find all my shares on my Facebook Page

item.title: 10 Unusual Things I Learned From Mr. X – Altucher Confidential
item.description:
